calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Floyd Butler.
Curtis Dowling, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Develpoment Corp., Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Roger Fennal, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Cheryse Cheek.
Exh. 1 Threeday Notice-----------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Cheryse Cheek as follows:
Restitution and possession of the property located at 217 Eddy St., Unit #314, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Back-Rents and Damages $1,126.56
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs per memo of cost.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit and Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CURTIS F. DOWLING, ESQUIRE FOR PLAINTIFF. ROGER FENNEL, PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE, MARINUS GOOSSENS, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY.

MATTER CALLED. DEFENDANT CHERYSE CHEEK HAS FAILED TO APPEAR. COURT TAKES THE MATTER OFF OF THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR. THE TRIAL DATE IS MAINTAINED.

SUE KAPLAN, COMMISSIONER, CLERK GAIL PEERLESS, NOT REPORTED
